summary: Frontend-only testing of Audix Counter Scanner App for Bug 1 and Bug 2. Bug 1 (items vanishing after submit) - The app correctly prevents accessing submitted locations from /scan page with proper error message. Items ARE persisted to database (seen in Reports). The bug as described appears to be about reopening a submitted location - requires authorization flow via Reports page. Bug 2 (cross-location data contamination) - PARTIAL FIX VERIFIED but intermittent issues observed. When rapidly switching between locations, data from one location occasionally leaks into another due to race condition between flush-save and loading effects.

integration_issues.issue: Intermittent cross-location data contamination when rapidly switching between locations. Temp items from Location A occasionally appear in Location B due to race condition between flushSaveItems and the loading useEffect

bug_1.description: Location data vanishes from UI after submit
observations: Submitted locations are correctly blocked from /scan page with message: 'Location X is already scanned and completed. Manual authorization required to reopen.'
Items ARE persisted to database - verified via Reports page showing correct qty
Bug may be specifically about the REOPEN flow - when a submitted location is reopened via authorization, items should reload
Did not test complete reopen flow with authorization modal
tempItemsOwnerRef is properly implemented to track data ownership
batchSaveScannedItems now REPLACES items instead of merging (verified in console logs)
HOWEVER: Race condition observed - when switching locations rapidly, old location's items occasionally appeared in new location
Issue is in ScanItems.jsx lines 1024-1034 where flushSaveItems runs async but setTempScannedItems([]) and setSelectedLocationId run sync
The loading effect (lines 379-440) can read stale localStorage data before flush completes
bug_2.potential_fix: Consider awaiting the flush or using a synchronous localStorage.setItem for the flush when switching locations. Alternatively, add a 'switching locations' guard flag to prevent loading until flush completes.

action_items: Bug 2: Fix race condition in ScanItems.jsx handleLocationScan - flush should complete BEFORE new location is selected. Consider synchronous localStorage save when switching, or add a loading guard.
Bug 1: Verify reopen flow works correctly - when user authorizes via Reports page to reopen a submitted location, items should reload and be editable
Optional: Add loading indicator during location switching to prevent user interaction during the async operations
critical_code_review_comments: ScanItems.jsx lines 1024-1034: Race condition potential - flushSaveItems is async but clearing and setting new location is sync. The loading effect can fire before flush completes.
AppContext.js: Multiple functions not wrapped in useCallback causing useMemo warnings (not a bug but performance issue)
Consider adding a 'locationSwitchInProgress' ref to guard against loading stale data during location switches

success_rate.backend: N/A - backend testing skipped per request

seed_data_creation: None - used existing mockData (WH-A1, WH-A2, WH-B-CS, RT-SF locations with their mock scannedItems)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug 2 has a race condition that manifests intermittently when rapidly switching locations. Test by: 1) Select WH-B-CS, scan an item, 2) Immediately switch to RT-SF, 3) Check if RT-SF shows WH-B-CS items. Bug 1 requires testing the authorization/reopen flow from Reports page.

rca_of_the_issue.bug_2_root_cause: Race condition in ScanItems.jsx handleLocationScan function. When switching locations: 1) flushSaveItems runs asynchronously with debouncing, 2) tempScannedItems is cleared to [], 3) selectedLocationId is updated, 4) Loading effect fires and reads localStorage BEFORE flush completes, potentially loading stale/wrong data. The tempItemsOwnerRef check helps but doesn't fully prevent the issue.
reproduction_steps: 4. Immediately navigate to /scan and select RT-SF
5. RT-SF may incorrectly show Olive Oil from WH-B-CS
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Make the flush synchronous when switching locations, or add a guard that prevents loading until flush completes
